approach: Split reconstruction at position i using lemma_reconstruct_radix_2w_split. Show prefixes equal (digits 0..i unchanged). Split suffix at position 2 to isolate modified digits. Show tails from i+2 equal. Algebraic cancellation: -carry*pw + pw*carry = 0. Needed explicit recursive unfolding of reconstruct for 2-element sequences.
key_insight: Carry operation redistributes value across digit boundary: subtracting carry*2^w from position i and adding carry to position i+1 nets zero in the weighted sum.
notes: First submission failed because SMT couldn't unfold reconstruct_radix_2w for 2-element sequences. Added explicit assertions for recursive unfolding (skip(1), skip(1).skip(1), len checks) which solved it.
